questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務或工具可以免費提供 Amazon EC2 資源大小調整建議？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool can provide rightsizing recommendations for Amazon EC2 resources at no additional cost?

A.zh: AWS Well-Architected Tool
A.en: AWS Well-Architected Tool

B.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
B.en: Amazon CloudWatch

C.zh: AWS Cost Explorer
C.en: AWS Cost Explorer

D.zh: Amazon S3 analytics
D.en: Amazon S3 analytics

A.zh: 錯誤。此工具主要用於評估架構是否符合AWS最佳實務並提供改進建議，但不直接提供EC2資源的權衡建議。
A.en: Incorrect. This tool is mainly used to evaluate whether the architecture conforms to AWS best practices and provide improvement suggestions, but it does not directly provide trade-off suggestions for EC2 resources.

B.zh: 錯誤。CloudWatch主要用於監控資源的效能和運作狀態。雖然它可以間接幫助使用者了解資源使用情況，但沒有提供具體的權衡建議。
B.en: Incorrect. CloudWatch is mainly used to monitor the performance and operating status of resources. Although it can indirectly help users understand resource usage, it does not provide specific trade-off recommendations.

C.zh: 正確。Cost Explorer可以提供詳細的成本分析，並包含EC2資源權衡建議功能，幫助使用者優化成本。
C.en: Correct. Cost Explorer can provide detailed cost analysis and include EC2 resource trade-off recommendation functions to help users optimize costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。此工具用於分析S3儲存使用情況並協助最佳化儲存成本，但與EC2資源無關。
D.en: Incorrect. This tool is used to analyze S3 storage usage and help optimize storage costs, but has nothing to do with EC2 resources.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Cost Explorer可以提供詳細的成本分析，並包含EC2資源權衡建議功能，幫助使用者優化成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cost Explorer can provide detailed cost analysis and include EC2 resource trade-off recommendation functions to help users optimize costs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司經營一個 PB 級資料倉儲來分析其資料。該公司想要一種不需要手動硬體和軟體管理的解決方案。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company operates a petabyte-scale data warehouse to analyze its data. The company wants a solution that will not require manual hardware and software management. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)
A.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

B.zh: Amazon Redshift
B.en: Amazon Redshift

C.zh: Amazon Neptune
C.en: Amazon Neptune

D.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
D.en: Amazon ElastiCache

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DocumentDB 是一種檔案資料庫服務，主要用於儲存和查詢 JSON 格式的檔案資料。不適合資料倉儲場景。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon DocumentDB is a document database service mainly used to store and query document data in JSON format. It is not suitable for data warehouse scenarios.

B.zh: 正確。該服務是專門針對資料倉儲設計的服務，支援PB級資料分析，並且完全託管，無需人工管理硬體和軟體。
B.en: Correct. This service is a service designed specifically for data warehousing, supporting petabyte-scale data analysis, and is fully managed, eliminating the need for manual management of hardware and software.

C.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一種圖資料庫服務，主要用於儲存和查詢社交網路關係等圖表資料。不適合資料倉儲場景。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is a graph database service primarily used for storing and querying graph data such as social network relationships. It is not suitable for data warehouse scenarios.

D.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一項記憶體快取服務，主要設計用於加速應用程式效能，而不是用於資料倉儲場景。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is an in-memory caching service designed primarily to accelerate application performance rather than for use in data warehousing scenarios.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：該服務是專門針對資料倉儲設計的服務，支援PB級資料分析，並且完全託管，無需人工管理硬體和軟體。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service designed specifically for data warehousing, supporting petabyte-scale data analysis, and is fully managed, eliminating the need for manual management of hardware and software.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家圖書館希望根據圖書內容自動對電子圖書進行分類。圖書館應使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A library wants to automate the classification of electronic books based on the contents of the books. Which AWS service should the library use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: Amazon Redshift
A.en: Amazon Redshift

B.zh: Amazon CloudSearch
B.en: Amazon CloudSearch

C.zh: Amazon Comprehend
C.en: Amazon Comprehend

D.zh: Amazon Aurora
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一項資料倉儲服務，主要用於分析結構化資料。它不具備自然語言處理和內部分類的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is a data warehouse service primarily used for analyzing structured data. It does not have the function of natural language processing and internal classification.

B.zh: 錯誤。此服務是一項託管搜尋服務，用於對檔案執行全文搜尋。雖然可以索引文檔，但不具備自動分類文檔內容的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is a managed search service used to perform full-text search on documents. Although it can index documents, it does not have the function of automatically classifying document contents.

C.zh: 正確。此服務是一種自然語言處理服務，可分析文字內容並提取關鍵字、主題、細節等資訊。它可用於自動對檔案內容進行分類。
C.en: Correct. This service is a natural language processing service that can analyze text content and extract key words, topics, details and other information. It can be used to automatically classify document content.

D.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一種關聯式資料庫服務，主要用於儲存和管理結構化資料。它不具備自然語言處理和內部分類的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is a relational database service primarily used to store and manage structured data. It does not have the function of natural language processing and internal classification.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此服務是一種自然語言處理服務，可分析文字內容並提取關鍵字、主題、細節等資訊。它可用於自動對檔案內容進行分類。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a natural language processing service that can analyze text content and extract key words, topics, details and other information. It can be used to automatically classify document content.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，哪一項任務是 AWS 的責任？
question_text.en: Which task is a responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 應用程式資料加密
A.en: Encryption of application data

B.zh: 應用程式使用者的身份驗證
B.en: Authentication of application users

C.zh: 實體網路基礎設施的保護
C.en: Protection of physical network infrastructure

D.zh: 防火牆配置
D.en: Configuration of firewalls

A.zh: 錯誤。應用程式資料中的加密錯誤。根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，應用程式資料的加密是客戶的責任。客戶需要確保其應用資料在傳輸和預存過程中是加密且安全的。
A.en: Incorrect. Encryption error in application data. Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, encryption of application data is the customer's responsibility. Customers need to ensure that their application data is encrypted and secure during transmission and storage.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：應用程式使用者的身份驗證錯誤。使用使用者的身分證是客戶的責任。客戶需要設定和管理使用者身分認證機制，例如使用AWS IAM或其他身分認證服務。
B.en: Incorrect. Authentication error for application user. It is the customer's responsibility to use the user's identity card. Customers need to configure and manage user identity authentication mechanisms, such as using AWS IAM or other identity authentication services.

C.zh: 正確。實體網路基礎設施得到適當保護。根據AWS責任共擔模型，AWS負責保護其整個基礎設施的安全，包括管理網路、硬體和資料中心。
C.en: Correct. The physical network infrastructure is properly protected. According to the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, AWS is responsible for protecting the security of its entire infrastructure, including management networks, hardware, and data centers.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：防火牆配置防火牆配置是客戶的責任。客戶需要配置安全群組、網路ACL等來保護自己的資產。
D.en: Incorrect. Firewall configuration Firewall configuration is the customer's responsibility. Customers need to configure security groups, network ACLs, etc. to protect their assets.

answer_text.zh: C. 實體網路基礎設施的保護
answer_text.en: C. Protection of physical network infrastructure

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：實體網路基礎設施得到適當保護。根據AWS責任共擔模型，AWS負責保護其整個基礎設施的安全，包括管理網路、硬體和資料中心。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The physical network infrastructure is properly protected. According to the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, AWS is responsible for protecting the security of its entire infrastructure, including management networks, hardware, and data centers.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 雲端轉型之旅建議包含哪些選項？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) cloud transformation journey recommendations? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 設想階段
A.en: Envision phase

B.zh: 對齊相位
B.en: Align phase

C.zh: 評估階段
C.en: Assess phase

D.zh: 動員階段
D.en: Mobilize phase

A.zh: 正確。願景階段）：願景階段是 AWS CAF 雲端轉型之旅的第一步，旨在定義組織的雲端目標和策略。
A.en: Correct. Vision Phase): The vision phase is the first step in the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey and is designed to define the organization's cloud goals and strategy.

B.zh: 正確。調整階段）：調整階段是 AWS CAF 雲端轉型之旅的重要組成部分，確保組織的目標與雲端策略保持一致。
B.en: Correct. Alignment Phase): The alignment phase is an important part of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey, ensuring that the organization's goals are aligned with the cloud strategy.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：評估階段）：評估階段是 AWS CAF 的組成部分，但不是雲端轉型之旅的建議階段。
C.en: Incorrect. Evaluation phase): The assessment phase is an integral part of AWS CAF, but it is not a recommended phase of the cloud transformation journey.

D.zh: 錯誤。移動階段）：移動階段是雲端遷移準備的一部分，但不是 AWS CAF 雲端轉型之旅的建議階段。
D.en: Incorrect. Mobilization phase): The mobilization phase is part of cloud migration preparation, but it is not a recommended phase of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey.

E.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：遷移與現代化階段）：遷移和現代化階段是雲端遷移的實際執行階段，但不是 AWS CAF 雲端轉型之旅的建議階段。
E.en: Incorrect. Migration and Modernization Phase): The migration and modernization phase is the actual execution phase of cloud migration, but it is not the recommended phase of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey.

answer_text.zh: A. 設想階段；B. 對齊相位
answer_text.en: A. Envision phase; B. Align phase

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AB (74%)；AD (26%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：願景階段）：願景階段是 AWS CAF 雲端轉型之旅的第一步，旨在定義組織的雲端目標和策略。；調整階段）：調整階段是 AWS CAF 雲端轉型之旅的重要組成部分，確保組織的目標與雲端策略保持一致。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AB (74%); AD (26%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Vision Phase): The vision phase is the first step in the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey and is designed to define the organization's cloud goals and strategy.; Alignment Phase): The alignment phase is an important part of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey, ensuring that the organization's goals are aligned with the cloud strategy.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要產生 IAM 使用者清單。該公司還希望查看與使用者關聯的各種憑證的狀態，例如密碼、存取金鑰和多重身份驗證 (MFA) 設備。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to generate a list of IAM users. The company also wants to view the status of various credentials that are associated with the users, such as password, access keys, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) devices. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: IAM credential report
A.en: IAM credential report

B.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

C.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer
C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer

D.zh: AWS Cost and Usage Report
D.en: AWS Cost and Usage Report

A.zh: 正確。IAM 憑證報告是一項產生 CSV 檔案的功能，其中列出所有 IAM 使用者及其閘道憑證狀態（例如密碼、存取金鑰、MFA 裝置等）。這是滿足問題需求的正確選項。
A.en: Correct. IAM Credentials Report is a feature that generates a CSV file listing all IAM users and their gateway credential status (e.g. passwords, access keys, MFA devices, etc.). This is the correct option to meet the needs of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS IAM Identity Center（以前稱為AWS Single Sign-On）主要用於集中管理使用者存取權限和單點入口，不提供產生IAM使用者憑證報告的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly known as AWS Single Sign-On) is mainly used to centrally manage user access rights and single point of entry, and does not provide the function of generating IAM user credential reports.

C.zh: 錯誤。IAM存取分析器用於分析資源的存取權限，以協助識別資源是否已被外部實體存取。它不涉及產生使用者憑證報告。
C.en: Incorrect. IAM Access Analyzer is used to analyze the access permissions of resources and help identify whether resources are accessed by external entities. It does not involve generating user credentials reports.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 成本和使用情況報告用於追蹤和分析 AWS 服務的成本和使用情況，無論 IAM 使用者憑證狀態如何。
D.en: Incorrect. The AWS Cost and Usage Report is used to track and analyze the cost and usage of AWS services regardless of IAM user credential status.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM 憑證報告是一項產生 CSV 檔案的功能，其中列出所有 IAM 使用者及其閘道憑證狀態（例如密碼、存取金鑰、MFA 裝置等）。這是滿足問題需求的正確選項。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM Credentials Report is a feature that generates a CSV file listing all IAM users and their gateway credential status (e.g. passwords, access keys, MFA devices, etc.). This is the correct option to meet the needs of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在設計其 AWS 工作負載，以便可以定期更新組件，並以小的、可逆的增量進行更改。此設計支援 AWS 架構完善框架的哪一個支柱？
question_text.en: A company is designing its AWS workloads so that components can be updated regularly and so that changes can be made in small, reversible increments. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this design support?

A.zh: 安全
A.en: Security

B.zh: 性能效率
B.en: Performance efficiency

C.zh: 卓越運營
C.en: Operational excellence

D.zh: 可靠性
D.en: Reliability

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：安全支柱著重於保護資料、系統和資產，主要涉及存取控制、資料加密等，與問題中所述的「更新元件」和「可逆變更」沒有直接關係。
A.en: Incorrect. The security pillar focuses on protecting data, systems and assets, mainly involving access control, data encryption, etc., and is not directly related to the "updating components" and "reversible changes" stated in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能效率支柱著重於最佳化資源使用以提高效能。主要涉及選擇合適的資源類型和大小，與問題中陳述的設計原則沒有直接關係。
B.en: Incorrect. The performance efficiency pillar focuses on optimizing resource usage to improve performance. It mainly involves selecting appropriate resource types and sizes and is not directly related to the design principles stated in the question.

C.zh: 正確。卓越營運支柱強調透過流程的自動化和最佳化來實現高效的營運管理，並支援小規模、可逆的變更，這與標題中描述的設計原則完全一致。
C.en: Correct. The operational excellence pillar emphasizes achieving efficient operational management through automation and optimization of processes, and supports small-scale, reversible changes, which is fully consistent with the design principles described in the title.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：可靠性支柱著重於系統的彈性和故障處理能力。雖然與系統設計相關，但主題側重於「更新組件」和「可逆變更」，這更符合卓越運營的理念。
D.en: Incorrect. The reliability pillar focuses on the system's resilience and fault handling capabilities. Although it is related to system design, the topic focuses on "updating components" and "reversible changes", which is more in line with the concept of operational excellence.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：卓越營運支柱強調透過流程的自動化和最佳化來實現高效的營運管理，並支援小規模、可逆的變更，這與標題中描述的設計原則完全一致。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The operational excellence pillar emphasizes achieving efficient operational management through automation and optimization of processes, and supports small-scale, reversible changes, which is fully consistent with the design principles described in the title.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要追蹤其 Amazon S3 物件的標籤、儲存桶和前綴。哪個 S3 功能可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to track tags, buckets, and prefixes for its Amazon S3 objects. Which S3 feature will meet this requirement?

A.zh: S3 Inventory report
A.en: S3 Inventory report

B.zh: S3 Lifecycle
B.en: S3 Lifecycle

C.zh: S3 Versioning
C.en: S3 Versioning

D.zh: S3 ACLs
D.en: S3 ACLs

A.zh: 正確。S3 Inventory 報告是一項功能，可協助使用者追蹤 S3 儲存桶中的物件元資料，包括標籤、檔案等。這正是問題所需的功能。
A.en: Correct. The S3 Inventory report is a feature that helps users track object metadata in S3 buckets, including tags, files, etc. This is exactly the function required by the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。S3 生命週期用於定義對象的儲存管理規則，例如將物件遷移到低成本儲存或刪除對象，但不用於追蹤目標、儲存桶或物件。
B.en: Incorrect. The S3 lifecycle is used to define storage management rules for objects, such as migrating objects to low-cost storage or deleting objects, but it is not used to track targets, buckets, or objects.

C.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於管理物件的多個版本，但不提供追蹤檔案、儲存桶或檔案的功能。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is used to manage multiple versions of an object, but it does not provide the ability to track files, buckets, or files.

D.zh: 錯誤。S3 存取控制清單 (ACL) 用於管理對物件和儲存桶的存取，但不涉及追蹤物件、儲存桶或儲存桶。
D.en: Incorrect. S3 Access Control Lists (ACLs) are used to manage access to objects and buckets, but they do not involve tracking objects, buckets, or buckets.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：S3 Inventory 報告是一項功能，可協助使用者追蹤 S3 儲存桶中的物件元資料，包括標籤、檔案等。這正是問題所需的功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The S3 Inventory report is a feature that helps users track object metadata in S3 buckets, including tags, files, etc. This is exactly the function required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望允許使用者使用一組憑證對多個 AWS 帳戶進行驗證和授權。哪種 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to allow users to authenticate and authorize multiple AWS accounts by using a single set of credentials. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Organizations
A.en: AWS Organizations

B.zh: IAM user
B.en: IAM user

C.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

D.zh: AWS Control Tower
D.en: AWS Control Tower

A.zh: 錯誤。本服務主要用於管理多個AWS帳戶的組織架構和策略，但不直接提供使用者身分認證和授權功能。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is mainly used to manage the organizational structure and policies of multiple AWS accounts, but it does not directly provide user identity authentication and authorization functions.

B.zh: 錯誤。本服務是針對單一帳戶的身份認證機制，無法實現跨多個帳戶的單一身分認證和授權。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is an identity authentication mechanism for a single account and cannot implement single identity authentication and authorization across multiple accounts.

C.zh: 正確。此選項允許使用者使用單一驗證來存取多個 AWS 帳戶和應用程式。是解決跨帳戶認證授權的最佳選擇。
C.en: Correct. This option allows users to use a single identity authentication to access multiple AWS accounts and applications. It is the best choice to solve cross-account authentication and authorization.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項提供了設定和管理多帳戶環境的最佳實踐，但它不直接提供使用者身份驗證和授權功能。
D.en: Incorrect. This option provides best practices for setting up and managing multi-account environments, but it does not directly provide user authentication and authorization capabilities.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
answer_text.en: C. AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項允許使用者使用單一驗證來存取多個 AWS 帳戶和應用程式。是解決跨帳戶認證授權的最佳選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option allows users to use a single identity authentication to access multiple AWS accounts and applications. It is the best choice to solve cross-account authentication and authorization.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司創建了一個 Amazon EC2 執行個體。該公司希望在執行個體層級控制傳入和傳出的網路流量。哪些 AWS 資源或服務可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company created an Amazon EC2 instance. The company wants to control the incoming and outgoing network traffic at the instance level. Which AWS resource or service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Shield
A.en: AWS Shield

B.zh: Security groups
B.en: Security groups

C.zh: 網路存取分析儀
C.en: Network Access Analyzer

D.zh: VPC endpoints
D.en: VPC endpoints

A.zh: 錯誤。此服務是託管分散式阻斷服務 (DDoS) 保護服務，用於保護應用程式免受 DDoS 攻擊。它不用於控制 EC2 執行個體的網路流量。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is a managed distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) protection service used to protect applications from DDoS attacks. It is not used to control network traffic of EC2 instances.

B.zh: 正確。這些選擇是用於控制 EC2 執行個體的入站和出站流量的虛擬防火牆。它是為執行個體級網路流量控製而設計。
B.en: Correct. These choices are a virtual firewall used to control inbound and outbound traffic to EC2 instances. It is specifically designed for instance-level network traffic control.

C.zh: 錯誤。本服務是用於分析和最佳化網路存取權限的工具。它不會直接控制EC2執行個體的網路流量。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is a tool used to analyze and optimize network access rights. It does not directly control the network traffic of EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。這些選項用於在 VPC 內私下連接到 AWS 服務，而無需透過 Internet。它不用於控制 EC2 執行個體的網路流量。
D.en: Incorrect. These choices are used to connect to AWS services privately within a VPC without going over the Internet. It is not used to control network traffic of EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：這些選擇是用於控制 EC2 執行個體的入站和出站流量的虛擬防火牆。它是為執行個體級網路流量控製而設計。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: These choices are a virtual firewall used to control inbound and outbound traffic to EC2 instances. It is specifically designed for instance-level network traffic control.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 雲端在全球部署應用程式。公司應該採用哪種架構部署模型來滿足這個需求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use the AWS Cloud to deploy an application globally. Which architecture deployment model should the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 多區域
A.en: Multi-Region

B.zh: 單一區域
B.en: Single-Region

C.zh: 多可用區
C.en: Multi-AZ

D.zh: 單可用區
D.en: Single-AZ

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：多區域部署模型允許應用程式在多個地理區域運行，滿足全球使用者的低延遲需求，同時提供更高的可用性和容災能力。
A.en: Correct. The multi-region deployment model allows applications to run in multiple geographic regions, meeting the low-latency needs of global users while providing higher availability and disaster tolerance.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：單一區域）：單區域部署僅限於一個地理區域，無法滿足全球使用者需求，可能會導致較高的延遲和單點故障風險。
B.en: Incorrect. Single zone): Single-region deployment is limited to one geographical area and cannot meet global user needs, which may result in higher latency and single point of failure risks.

C.zh: 錯誤。多個可用區）：多可用區部署僅提供單一區域內的高可用性，無法擴展到全球以滿足全球使用者的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Multiple Availability Zones): Multi-AZ deployment only provides high availability within a single region and cannot be extended globally to meet the needs of global users.

D.zh: 錯誤。單一可用區）：單一可用區部署風險較高，且僅限於單一區域，無法滿足全球應用部署需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Single Availability Zone): Single availability zone deployment has high risks and is limited to a single region, making it unable to meet global application deployment needs.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：多區域部署模型允許應用程式在多個地理區域運行，滿足全球使用者的低延遲需求，同時提供更高的可用性和容災能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The multi-region deployment model allows applications to run in multiple geographic regions, meeting the low-latency needs of global users while providing higher availability and disaster tolerance.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要一個 Web 應用程式與各種 AWS 服務互動。哪種 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants a web application to interact with various AWS services. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS CloudShell
A.en: AWS CloudShell

B.zh: AWS Marketplace
B.en: AWS Marketplace

C.zh: AWS Management Console
C.en: AWS Management Console

D.zh: AWS CLI
D.en: AWS CLI

A.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一個基於瀏覽器的命令列介面，用於執行 AWS CLI 命令。雖然它可以與 AWS 服務交互，但它主要用於命令列操作，而不是用於建置和管理 Web 應用程式。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is a browser-based command line interface for running AWS CLI commands. Although it can interact with AWS services, it is primarily intended for command line operations rather than for building and managing web applications.

B.zh: 錯誤。該服務是一個用於購買和部署第三方軟體解決方案的線上商店。它不直接用於與 AWS 服務互動或建立 Web 應用程式。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is an online store for purchasing and deploying third-party software solutions. It is not used directly to interact with AWS services or build web applications.

C.zh: 正確。AWS 管理主控臺是一個基於 Web 的介面，可讓使用者透過圖形介面與 AWS 服務互動。它是管理和建立 Web 應用程式的最佳選擇。
C.en: Correct. The AWS Management Console is a web-based interface that allows users to interact with AWS services through a graphical interface. It is the best option for managing and building web applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CLI 是一個用於與 AWS 服務互動的命令列工具。雖然它功能強大，但並不適合直接用於建立網路應用程式。
D.en: Incorrect. The AWS CLI is a command-line tool for interacting with AWS services. Although it is powerful, it is not suitable for direct use in building web applications.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (70%)；D (30%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS 管理主控臺是一個基於 Web 的介面，可讓使用者透過圖形介面與 AWS 服務互動。它是管理和建立 Web 應用程式的最佳選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (70%); D (30%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS Management Console is a web-based interface that allows users to interact with AWS services through a graphical interface. It is the best option for managing and building web applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將其應用程式從本地遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望確保僅向應用程式分配執行所有操作所需的最低權限。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its applications from on-premises to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to ensure that the applications are assigned only the minimum permissions that are needed to perform all operations. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
A.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

B.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
B.en: Amazon CloudWatch

C.zh: Amazon Macie
C.en: Amazon Macie

D.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
D.en: Amazon GuardDuty

A.zh: 正確。IAM 是 AWS 的核心服務，用於管理使用者、群組、角色和權限。支援最小權限原則，透過精細化的權限策略確保資源安全。
A.en: Correct. IAM is the core service of AWS and is used to manage users, groups, roles, and permissions. It supports the principle of least privilege and ensures resource security through refined permission policies.

B.zh: 錯誤。CloudWatch 是一項用於監控和管理 AWS 資源的服務。主要用於收集、查看日誌、指標、設定警告。與權限管理無關。
B.en: Incorrect. CloudWatch is a service used to monitor and manage AWS resources. It is mainly used to collect and view logs, indicators, and set alarms. It has nothing to do with permission management.

C.zh: 錯誤。Macie 是一項資料安全服務，用於識別和保護敏感資料（例如 PII），與權限管理沒有直接關係。
C.en: Incorrect. Macie is a data security service used to identify and protect sensitive data (such as PII) and is not directly related to rights management.

D.zh: 錯誤。GuardDuty 是一種威脅偵測服務，用於識別潛在的安全威脅，與權限管理沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect. GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security threats and is not directly related to rights management.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
answer_text.en: A. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM 是 AWS 的核心服務，用於管理使用者、群組、角色和權限。支援最小權限原則，透過精細化的權限策略確保資源安全。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM is the core service of AWS and is used to manage users, groups, roles, and permissions. It supports the principle of least privilege and ensures resource security through refined permission policies.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪些選項是 AWS 雲端採用架構 (AWS CAF) 治理視角功能？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) governance perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 身分與存取管理
A.en: Identity and access management

B.zh: 雲端財務管理
B.en: Cloud financial management

C.zh: 應用程式組合管理
C.en: Application portfolio management

D.zh: 創新管理
D.en: Innovation management

A.zh: 錯誤。身分和存取管理屬於 AWS CAF 的安全視角，而非治理視角。
A.en: Incorrect.This option is described as follows: Identity and access management belongs to the Security Perspective of AWS CAF, not the governance perspective.

B.zh: 正確。取得雲端財務管理雲端財務管理是從治理角度來看的重要能力之一，旨在優化雲端成本並確保財務透明度。
B.en: Correct. Get cloud financial management Cloud financial management is one of the important capabilities from a governance perspective, aiming to optimize cloud costs and ensure financial transparency.

C.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：應用程式組合管理是治理觀點的核心功能之一，涉及管理和最佳化組織的應用程式組合。
C.en: Correct.This option is described as follows: Application portfolio management is one of the core capabilities of the governance perspective and involves managing and optimizing an organization's application portfolio.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：創新管理屬於AWS CAF的創新視角，而非治理視角。
D.en: Incorrect.This option is described as follows: Innovation management belongs to the Innovation Perspective of AWS CAF, not the governance perspective.

E.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：產品管理通常與營運或交付相關，屬於治理觀點以外的其他觀點。
E.en: Incorrect.This option is described as follows: Product management is usually related to operations or delivery and belongs to other perspectives than the governance perspective.

answer_text.zh: B. 雲端財務管理；C. 應用程式組合管理
answer_text.en: B. Cloud financial management; C. Application portfolio management

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BC (82%)；AB (18%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：取得雲端財務管理雲端財務管理是從治理角度來看的重要能力之一，旨在優化雲端成本並確保財務透明度。；應用程式組合管理是治理觀點的核心功能之一，涉及管理和最佳化組織的應用程式組合。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (82%); AB (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Get cloud financial management Cloud financial management is one of the important capabilities from a governance perspective, aiming to optimize cloud costs and ensure financial transparency.; Application portfolio management is one of the core capabilities of the governance perspective and involves managing and optimizing an organization's application portfolio.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務提供單一位置來追蹤應用程式遷移的進度？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations?

A.zh: AWS Application Discovery Service
A.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

B.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
B.en: AWS Application Migration Service

C.zh: AWS Service Catalog
C.en: AWS Service Catalog

D.zh: AWS Migration Hub
D.en: AWS Migration Hub

A.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於收集有關本地資料中心中的伺服器、應用程式和依賴項的資訊，以協助規劃遷移。它不提供追蹤遷移進度的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is used to collect information about servers, applications, and dependencies in an on-premises data center to help plan migrations. It does not provide functionality to track migration progress.

B.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於將本機伺服器遷移到 AWS，但其主要功能是執行遷移，而不是提供單一位置來追蹤遷移進度。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is used to migrate on-premises servers to AWS, but its primary function is to perform the migration, not to provide a single location to track migration progress.

C.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於管理和部署預先定義的雲端資源集合。它與應用程式遷移無關，也不提供遷移進度追蹤。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is used to manage and deploy a predefined collection of cloud resources. It has nothing to do with application migration and does not provide migration progress tracking.

D.zh: 正確。該服務提供了一個位置來追蹤應用程式遷移的進度並支援多種遷移工具，是正確的答案。
D.en: Correct. This service, which provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations and supports multiple migration tools, is the right answer.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：該服務提供了一個位置來追蹤應用程式遷移的進度並支援多種遷移工具，是正確的答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service, which provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations and supports multiple migration tools, is the right answer.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用最新的 Amazon Linux 2 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI) 啟動了 Amazon EC2 執行個體。系統管理員可以採取哪些操作來連線到 EC2 執行個體？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company launched an Amazon EC2 instance with the latest Amazon Linux 2 Amazon Machine Image (AMI). Which actions can a system administrator take to connect to the EC2 instance? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect。
A.en: Use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect.

B.zh: 使用遠端桌面協定 (RDP) 連線。
B.en: Use a Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Batch。
C.en: Use AWS Batch.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 會話管理器。
D.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

A.zh: 正確。此選項使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect：Amazon EC2 Instance Connect 是一個基於瀏覽器的工具，用於透過 SSH 連接到 Amazon Linux 2 或 Ubuntu 執行個體。
A.en: Correct. This option use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect: Amazon EC2 Instance Connect is a browser-based tool for connecting to Amazon Linux 2 or Ubuntu instances via SSH.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項使用遠端桌面協定 (RDP) 連線：RDP 是用於連線至 Windows 執行個體的協定，且問題明確提到使用 Amazon Linux 2 AMI，因此它不適用。
B.en: Incorrect. This option use a Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection: RDP is a protocol used to connect to Windows instances, and the question clearly mentions that Amazon Linux 2 AMI is used, so it does not apply.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項使用 AWS Batch：AWS Batch 是一項用於執行批次作業的服務，與連線到 EC2 執行個體無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option use AWS Batch: AWS Batch is a service for running batch jobs and has nothing to do with connecting to EC2 instances.

D.zh: 正確。此選項使用 AWS Systems Manager 會話管理器：會話管理器允許透過 AWS 控制臺或 CLI 安全連接到 EC2 執行個體，無需 SSH 金鑰或開放連接埠。
D.en: Correct. This option use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager: Session Manager allows secure connection to EC2 instances via the AWS console or CLI, without the need for SSH keys or open ports.

E.zh: 錯誤。此選項使用 Amazon Connect：Amazon Connect 是一項雲端聯絡中心服務，與連線至 EC2 執行個體無關。
E.en: Incorrect. This option use Amazon Connect: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service and has nothing to do with connecting to EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect。；D. 使用 AWS Systems Manager 會話管理器。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect.; D. Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect：Amazon EC2 Instance Connect 是一個基於瀏覽器的工具，用於透過 SSH 連接到 Amazon Linux 2 或 Ubuntu 執行個體。；此選項使用 AWS Systems Manager 會話管理器：會話管理器允許透過 AWS 控制臺或 CLI 安全連接到 EC2 執行個體，無需 SSH 金鑰或開放連接埠。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect: Amazon EC2 Instance Connect is a browser-based tool for connecting to Amazon Linux 2 or Ubuntu instances via SSH.; This option use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager: Session Manager allows secure connection to EC2 instances via the AWS console or CLI, without the need for SSH keys or open ports.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪個架構概念描述了按需部署資源並在不再需要時釋放資源的能力？
question_text.en: Which architecture concept describes the ability to deploy resources on demand and release resources when they are no longer needed?

A.zh: 高可用性
A.en: High availability

B.zh: 解耦架構
B.en: Decoupled architecture

C.zh: 彈性
C.en: Resilience

D.zh: 彈性
D.en: Elasticity

A.zh: 錯誤。指系統在故障或高負載情況下仍能正常運作的能力。雖然與資產管理相關，但並不直接描述按需部署和釋放資產的能力。
A.en: Incorrect. refers to the ability of a system to operate normally despite failures or high load conditions. Although related to asset management, it does not directly describe the ability to deploy and release assets on demand.

B.zh: 錯誤。是指透過減少元件之間的依賴關係來提高系統的一致性和可維護性。解耦架構雖然可以間接支援彈性，但並沒有直接描述資產的按需部署和釋放。
B.en: Incorrect. refers to improving the consistency and maintainability of the system by reducing dependencies between components. Although the decoupled architecture can indirectly support elasticity, it does not directly describe the on-demand deployment and release of assets.

C.zh: 錯誤。指系統在遇到故障或中斷時恢復並繼續運作的能力。它與系統的穩定性和復原能力有關，但不直接描述資產的動態調整能力。
C.en: Incorrect. refers to the ability of a system to recover and continue operating in the face of failure or disruption. It is related to the stability and recovery ability of the system, but does not directly describe the dynamic adjustment ability of assets.

D.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：彈性伸縮：彈性伸縮是指根據需求動態調整資源的能力，包括按需部署資源和不需要時釋放資源。
D.en: Correct. Elastic scalability: Elastic scalability describes the ability to dynamically adjust resources according to demand, including deploying resources on demand and releasing resources when they are not needed.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：彈性伸縮：彈性伸縮是指根據需求動態調整資源的能力，包括按需部署資源和不需要時釋放資源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Elastic scalability: Elastic scalability describes the ability to dynamically adjust resources according to demand, including deploying resources on demand and releasing resources when they are not needed.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪個任務需要使用者以 AWS 帳戶根使用者身分登入？
question_text.en: Which task requires a user to sign in as the AWS account root user?

A.zh: 刪除 IAM 使用者
A.en: The deletion of IAM users

B.zh: 刪除 AWS 帳戶
B.en: The deletion of an AWS account

C.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中建立組織
C.en: The creation of an organization in AWS Organizations

D.zh: Amazon EC2 執行個體的刪除
D.en: The deletion of Amazon EC2 instances

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：刪除 IAM 使用者刪除 IAM 使用者不需要 root 使用者權限；具有適當權限的 IAM 使用者可以完成此任務。
A.en: Incorrect. Delete IAM user Deleting an IAM user does not require root user permissions; an IAM user with appropriate permissions can accomplish this task.

B.zh: 正確。刪除 AWS 帳號刪除 AWS 帳號是一項敏感操作，只有 root 使用者可以執行此任務。
B.en: Correct. Deleting AWS account is Deleting an AWS account is a sensitive operation and only the root user can perform this task.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：在 AWS Organizations 中建立組織。建立 AWS Organizations 組織不需要 root 使用者權限；具有適當權限的 IAM 使用者可以完成此任務。
C.en: Incorrect. creating organization in AWS Organizations. Root user permissions are not required to create an AWS Organizations organization; an IAM user with appropriate permissions can accomplish this task.

D.zh: 錯誤。刪除 Amazon EC2 執行個體刪除 EC2 執行個體不需要 root 使用者權限；具有適當權限的 IAM 使用者可以完成此任務。
D.en: Incorrect. Deletion of Amazon EC2 instance Deleting an EC2 instance does not require root user permissions; an IAM user with appropriate permissions can accomplish this task.

answer_text.zh: B. 刪除 AWS 帳戶
answer_text.en: B. The deletion of an AWS account

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (86%)；未標示選項的其餘比例 14%。熱門討論與考點摘要：刪除 AWS 帳號刪除 AWS 帳號是一項敏感操作，只有 root 使用者可以執行此任務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (86%); unlabeled remainder 14%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Deleting AWS account is Deleting an AWS account is a sensitive operation and only the root user can perform this task.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: Amazon S3 智慧分層儲存類別提供什麼？
question_text.en: What does the Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class offer?

A.zh: 透過預留儲存容量實現付款彈性
A.en: Payment flexibility by reserving storage capacity

B.zh: 透過將資料複製到加密的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 磁碟區來長期保留資料
B.en: Long-term retention of data by copying the data to an encrypted Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume

C.zh: 根據存取模式的變化在層之間移動對象，自動節省成本
C.en: Automatic cost savings by moving objects between tiers based on access pattern changes

D.zh: 安全、持久且成本最低的資料歸檔儲存
D.en: Secure, durable, and lowest cost storage for data archival

A.zh: 錯誤。S3 智慧分層的核心功能是根據存取模式自動最佳化儲存成本，而不是透過保留儲存容量來支付效能費用。預留儲存容量是 Amazon EC2 或 RDS 等其他服務的功能，與 S3 智慧分層無關。
A.en: Incorrect. The core functionality of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to automatically optimize storage costs based on access patterns, rather than paying for performance by reserving storage capacity. Reserved storage capacity is a feature of other services such as Amazon EC2 or RDS and has nothing to do with S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

B.zh: 錯誤。S3 智慧分層不會將資料複製到 Amazon EBS 磁碟區。 EBS是區塊儲存服務，與S3的物件儲存功能不同。
B.en: Incorrect. S3 Intelligent-Tiering does not copy data to Amazon EBS volumes. EBS is a block storage service, which is different from the object storage function of S3.

C.zh: 正確。S3智慧分層的主要功能是根據物件存取模式的變化自動在不同儲存層之間移動資料，從而優化儲存成本。此選項準確地描述了 S3 智慧分層的核心。
C.en: Correct. The main function of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to automatically move data between different storage tiers according to changes in access patterns of objects, thereby optimizing storage costs. This option accurately describes the core of S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項描述 Amazon S3 Glacier 或 S3 Glacier Deep Archive 的功能，而非 S3 智慧分層的功能。 S3 智慧分層的目標是優化儲存成本，而不是專門用於資料遷移。
D.en: Incorrect. This option describes the functionality of Amazon S3 Glacier or S3 Glacier Deep Archive, not S3 Intelligent-Tiering. The goal of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to optimize storage costs, not specifically for data relocation.

answer_text.zh: C. 根據存取模式的變化在層之間移動對象，自動節省成本
answer_text.en: C. Automatic cost savings by moving objects between tiers based on access pattern changes

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：S3智慧分層的主要功能是根據物件存取模式的變化自動在不同儲存層之間移動資料，從而優化儲存成本。此選項準確地描述了 S3 智慧分層的核心。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main function of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to automatically move data between different storage tiers according to changes in access patterns of objects, thereby optimizing storage costs. This option accurately describes the core of S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 公司需要 Amazon EC2 執行個體來實現可以容忍中斷的工作負載。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項滿足此要求，且與隨選價格相比折扣最大？
question_text.en: A company needs Amazon EC2 instances for a workload that can tolerate interruptions. Which EC2 instance purchasing option meets this requirement with the LARGEST discount compared to On-Demand prices?

A.zh: Spot Instances
A.en: Spot Instances

B.zh: 可轉換預留執行個體
B.en: Convertible Reserved Instances

C.zh: 標準預留執行個體
C.en: Standard Reserved Instances

D.zh: Dedicated Hosts
D.en: Dedicated Hosts

A.zh: 正確。該服務是 AWS 提供的購買選項，可讓使用者以大幅折扣執行 EC2 執行個體。這些執行個體可以隨時中斷，因此適合可容忍中斷的工作負載。與按需價格相比，現貨執行個體通常提供最大的折扣。
A.en: Correct. This service is a purchasing option provided by AWS that allows users to run EC2 instances at a significant discount. These instances can be interrupted at any time, making them suitable for workloads that can tolerate interruptions. Spot Instances usually offer the biggest discounts compared to On-Demand prices.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項可讓使用者在預留期間內變更執行個體類型，但折扣通常沒有 Spot 執行個體那麼高，且不適用於可容忍中斷的工作負載。
B.en: Incorrect. This option allows users to change instance types during the reservation period, but the discount is generally not as high as Spot Instances and is not available for workloads that can tolerate interruptions.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項提供更高的折扣，但它們是為長期穩定的工作負載而設計的，不適合可以容忍中斷的場景。
C.en: Incorrect. This option offer higher discounts, but they are designed for long-term stable workloads and are not suitable for scenarios that can tolerate interruptions.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項以更高的價格提供對實體伺服器的獨佔存取，適合滿足合規性或許可要求的工作負載，且沒有大幅折扣。
D.en: Incorrect. This option provide exclusive access to physical servers at a higher price, suitable for workloads that meet compliance or licensing requirements, without significant discounts.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：該服務是 AWS 提供的購買選項，可讓使用者以大幅折扣執行 EC2 執行個體。這些執行個體可以隨時中斷，因此適合可容忍中斷的工作負載。與按需價格相比，現貨執行個體通常提供最大的折扣。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a purchasing option provided by AWS that allows users to run EC2 instances at a significant discount. These instances can be interrupted at any time, making them suitable for workloads that can tolerate interruptions. Spot Instances usually offer the biggest discounts compared to On-Demand prices.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望確定可衡量的業務成果，以解釋公司遷移決定的價值。雲端轉型之旅的哪個階段包括這些活動？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to identify measurable business outcomes that will explain the value of the company's decision to migrate. Which phase of the cloud transformation journey includes these activities?

A.zh: 設想
A.en: Envision

B.zh: 對齊
B.en: Align

C.zh: 規模
C.en: Scale

D.zh: 啟動
D.en: Launch

A.zh: 正確。構想階段是雲端遷移的第一階段，重點在於定義業務目標、確定可衡量的業務成果，並為遷移提供清晰的價值聲明。這完全符合問題中所述的「識別可衡量的業務成果」。
A.en: Correct. The Envision phase is the first phase of cloud migration, focusing on defining business goals, identifying measurable business results, and providing a clear value statement for the migration. This perfectly matches the "identifying measurable business results" stated in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。Align階段主要專注於技術和團隊準備，包括團隊培訓和技術架構調整，而不是識別業務結果。
B.en: Incorrect. The Align phase mainly focuses on technology and group preparations, including team training and adjustment of technical architecture, rather than identifying business results.

C.zh: 錯誤。擴展階段是擴展和最佳化雲端使用的遷移後階段，與識別業務成果無關。
C.en: Incorrect. The Scale phase is the post-migration phase of scaling and optimizing cloud usage and has nothing to do with identifying business outcomes.

D.zh: 錯誤。Launch階段是雲端實際遷移並開始運作的階段。它與問題中所述的「識別業務成果」無關。
D.en: Incorrect. The Launch stage is the stage where the cloud is actually migrated and started running. It is not related to the "identifying business results" stated in the question.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (93%)；未標示選項的其餘比例 7%。熱門討論與考點摘要：構想階段是雲端遷移的第一階段，重點在於定義業務目標、確定可衡量的業務成果，並為遷移提供清晰的價值聲明。這完全符合問題中所述的「識別可衡量的業務成果」。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (93%); unlabeled remainder 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The Envision phase is the first phase of cloud migration, focusing on defining business goals, identifying measurable business results, and providing a clear value statement for the migration. This perfectly matches the "identifying measurable business results" stated in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務或元件允許來自 Internet 的入站流量存取 VPC？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or component allows inbound traffic from the internet to access a VPC?

A.zh: 網際網路閘道
A.en: Internet gateway

B.zh: NAT gateway
B.en: NAT gateway

C.zh: AWS WAF
C.en: AWS WAF

D.zh: VPC peering
D.en: VPC peering

A.zh: 正確。該服務是一個 VPC 元件，允許 VPC 中的資源和 Internet 之間的雙向通訊。它是實現網際網路存取的關鍵組件。
A.en: Correct. This service is a VPC component that allows two-way communication between resources in the VPC and the Internet. It is a key component that enables Internet access.

B.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於允許私有子網路中的資源存取Internet，但不允許Internet直接存取這些資源。它是單向的，僅用於出站流量。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is used to allow resources in a private subnet to access the Internet, but does not allow the Internet to directly access these resources. It is one-way and is used for outbound traffic only.

C.zh: 錯誤。該服務是 Web 應用程式防火牆，可保護 Web 應用程式免受外部流量攻擊，但不負責處理對 VPC 的 Internet 存取。分配。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is a web application firewall that protects web applications from external traffic attacks, but is not responsible for handling Internet access to the VPC. Distribution.

D.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於連接兩個VPC以實現私網通信，但不涉及網際網路流量的處理。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is used to connect two VPCs to achieve private network communication, but it does not involve the processing of Internet traffic.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (95%)；未標示選項的其餘比例 5%。熱門討論與考點摘要：該服務是一個 VPC 元件，允許 VPC 中的資源和 Internet 之間的雙向通訊。它是實現網際網路存取的關鍵組件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%); unlabeled remainder 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a VPC component that allows two-way communication between resources in the VPC and the Internet. It is a key component that enables Internet access.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務透過程式碼建立基礎架構？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can companies use to create infrastructure from code?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)

B.zh: AWS Outposts
B.en: AWS Outposts

C.zh: AWS CodePipeline
C.en: AWS CodePipeline

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EKS 是一項託管 Kubernetes 服務，用於運行容器化應用程式，而不是用於創建基礎設施代碼。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service for running containerized applications, not for creating infrastructure code.

B.zh: 錯誤。本服務是將 AWS 服務擴展到本地資料中心的解決方案，與基礎架構即代碼無關。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is a solution for extending AWS services to local data centers, agnostic of infrastructure as code.

C.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一項持續交付服務，用於自動化程式碼部署流程，但不用於建立基礎架構程式碼。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is a continuous delivery service that is used to automate the code deployment process, but it is not used to create infrastructure code.

D.zh: 正確。此服務可讓使用者透過範本定義和建立 AWS 資源，從而實現基礎架構即程式碼功能。
D.en: Correct. This service is a service that allows users to define and create AWS resources through templates, enabling infrastructure as code functionality.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此服務可讓使用者透過範本定義和建立 AWS 資源，從而實現基礎架構即程式碼功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service that allows users to define and create AWS resources through templates, enabling infrastructure as code functionality.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪一條指南是建構雲端應用程式的架構良好的設計原則？
question_text.en: Which guideline is a well-architected design principle for building cloud applications?

A.zh: 讓靜態資料更接近計算資源。
A.en: Keep static data closer to compute resources.

B.zh: 為峰值容量提供資源。
B.en: Provision resources for peak capacity.

C.zh: 故障自動恢復設計。
C.en: Design for automated recovery from failure.

D.zh: 使用緊密耦合的組件。
D.en: Use tightly coupled components.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然將資料放置在更靠近運算資源的位置可以提高效能，但這並不是 AWS 架構完善框架的核心設計原則之一。此選項更注重效能最佳化而不是故障復原。
A.en: Incorrect. While placing data closer to computing resources can improve performance, it is not one of the core design principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework. This option is more focused on performance optimization than failure recovery.

B.zh: 錯誤。為尖峰容量配置資源可能會導致資源浪費，不符合雲端運算的彈性原則。 AWS 建議使用按需擴充來優化成本和資源利用率。
B.en: Incorrect. Provisioning resources for peak capacity may lead to resource waste and is not in line with the elasticity principle of cloud computing. AWS recommends using on-demand scaling to optimize costs and resource utilization.

C.zh: 正確。設計從故障中自動恢復是AWS Well-Architected Framework的核心原則之一，它強調高可用性和彈性設計，以確保故障發生時能夠自動恢復。
C.en: Correct. Designing to automatically recover from failures is one of the core principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which emphasizes high availability and elastic design to ensure that failures can automatically recover when failures occur.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 建議使用鬆散耦合的元件設計來提高靈活性和可擴展性。緊密耦合的組件可能會導致單點故障的風險增加。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS recommends the use of loosely coupled groupware design to improve flexibility and scalability. Tightly coupled groupware can lead to an increased risk of single points of failure.

answer_text.zh: C. 故障自動恢復設計。
answer_text.en: C. Design for automated recovery from failure.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：設計從故障中自動恢復是AWS Well-Architected Framework的核心原則之一，它強調高可用性和彈性設計，以確保故障發生時能夠自動恢復。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Designing to automatically recover from failures is one of the core principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which emphasizes high availability and elastic design to ensure that failures can automatically recover when failures occur.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要將 75 PB 的資料從其本地資料中心移至 AWS。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務來最經濟高效地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to move 75 petabytes of data from its on-premises data centers to AWS. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized
A.en: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized

B.zh: AWS Snowmobile
B.en: AWS Snowmobile

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: AWS Storage Gateway
D.en: AWS Storage Gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。該服務用於中型資料遷移（通常為 TB 等級），但對於 75 PB 的資料量，使用 Snowball Edge 將需要大量設備，效率和成本遠不如 AWS Snowmobile。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is used for medium-sized data migration (often at the TB level), but for a data volume of 75 PB, using Snowball Edge will require a large number of devices, and the efficiency and cost are far inferior to AWS Snowmobile.

B.zh: 正確。該服務是針對大規模（PB級）資料遷移而設計的服務。它透過實體卡車傳輸資料，可以以高效且成本優化的方式移動 75 PB 的資料。
B.en: Correct. This service is a service designed for large-scale data migration (PB level). It transports data via physical trucks and can move 75 petabytes of data in an efficient and cost-optimized manner.

C.zh: 錯誤。此服務是一種網路連線服務，用於連續資料傳輸或較小規模的資料遷移。對於 75 PB 的資料，Direct Connect 的傳輸速度和成本都遠非理想。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is a network connection service used for continuous data transfer or smaller-scale data migration. For 75 PB of data, Direct Connect's transfer speed and cost are far from ideal.

D.zh: 錯誤。此服務主要用於混合雲端儲存解決方案，協助企業將本機資料與AWS雲端儲存進行傳輸。不適合大規模資料遷移場景。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is mainly used for hybrid cloud storage solutions to help enterprises transfer local data with AWS cloud storage. It is not suitable for large-scale data migration scenarios.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (80%)；A (20%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：該服務是針對大規模（PB級）資料遷移而設計的服務。它透過實體卡車傳輸資料，可以以高效且成本優化的方式移動 75 PB 的資料。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (80%); A (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service designed for large-scale data migration (PB level). It transports data via physical trucks and can move 75 petabytes of data in an efficient and cost-optimized manner.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 下列哪一個是 AWS 架構完善的框架的支柱？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 資源可擴充性
A.en: Resource scalability

B.zh: 性能效率
B.en: Performance efficiency

C.zh: 系統彈性
C.en: System elasticity

D.zh: 敏捷開發
D.en: Agile development

A.zh: 錯誤。資源可擴展性是AWS架構設計中的重要概念，但它並不是AWS架構完善框架的五個支柱之一。
A.en: Incorrect.This option is described as follows: Resource scalability is an important concept in AWS architectural design, but it is not one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

B.zh: 正確。效能效率是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，旨在優化資源使用以獲得最佳效能。
B.en: Correct.This option is described as follows: Performance efficiency is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which aims to optimize resource usage for optimal performance.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：系統彈性：系統彈性是一個與可靠性相關的概念，但它並未單獨列為 AWS 架構完善框架的支柱。
C.en: Incorrect. System Resilience: System resiliency is a concept related to reliability, but it is not separately listed as a pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：敏捷開發是一種軟體開發方法，與 AWS 架構完善的框架沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect.This option is described as follows: Agile development is a software development methodology and is not directly related to the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

E.zh: 正確。卓越營運是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，專注於運作和監控系統，以持續改善流程並支援業務目標。
E.en: Correct.This option is described as follows: Operational excellence, one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, focuses on running and monitoring systems to continuously improve processes and support business goals.

answer_text.zh: B. 性能效率；E. 卓越運營
answer_text.en: B. Performance efficiency; E. Operational excellence

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能效率是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，旨在優化資源使用以獲得最佳效能。；卓越營運是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，專注於運作和監控系統，以持續改善流程並支援業務目標。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance efficiency is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which aims to optimize resource usage for optimal performance.; Operational excellence, one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, focuses on running and monitoring systems to continuously improve processes and support business goals.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要將其本地資料中心連接到 AWS 雲端。該公司需要具有一致網路效能的專用、低延遲連線。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to connect its on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. The company needs a dedicated, low-latency connection with consistent network performance. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
A.en: AWS Global Accelerator

B.zh: Amazon CloudFront
B.en: Amazon CloudFront

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: AWS Managed VPN
D.en: AWS Managed VPN

A.zh: 錯誤。該服務主要用於透過將流量路由到最近的 AWS 區域來優化全球使用者存取的應用程式的效能。它不提供與本地資料中心的專用低延遲連線。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is mainly used to optimize the performance of applications accessed by global users by routing traffic to the nearest AWS region. It does not provide a dedicated low-latency connection to an on-premises data center.

B.zh: 錯誤。本服務是一項內容交付網路 (CDN) 服務，用於加速靜態和動態內容的交付。它不涉及到本地資料中心的專用連線或低延遲連線。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is a content delivery network (CDN) service used to accelerate the delivery of static and dynamic content. It doesn't involve dedicated connections or low-latency connections to on-premises data centers.

C.zh: 正確。此選項提供具有低延遲和一致網路效能的專用網路連接，非常適合將本機資料中心連接到 AWS 雲端環境。
C.en: Correct. This option provides a dedicated network connection with low latency and consistent network performance, ideal for connecting on-premises data centers to AWS cloud environments.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項提供基於 Internet 的加密連線。雖然它可以將本地資料中心連接到AWS，但其效能和延遲取決於公共網際網路，並且不如AWS Direct Connect那麼一致。
D.en: Incorrect. This option provides an encrypted connection based on the Internet. Although it can connect local data centers to AWS, its performance and latency depend on the public Internet and are not as consistent as AWS Direct Connect.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項提供具有低延遲和一致網路效能的專用網路連接，非常適合將本機資料中心連接到 AWS 雲端環境。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option provides a dedicated network connection with low latency and consistent network performance, ideal for connecting on-premises data centers to AWS cloud environments.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司應將哪些設計原則應用於 AWS 雲端工作負載，以最大限度地提高永續性並最大限度地減少對環境的影響？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which design principles should a company apply to AWS Cloud workloads to maximize sustainability and minimize environmental impact? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 最大限度地利用 Amazon EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Maximize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.

B.zh: 最大限度地減少 Amazon EC2 執行個體的使用率。
B.en: Minimize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.

C.zh: 盡量減少託管服務的使用。
C.en: Minimize usage of managed services.

D.zh: 強制使用者經常重新安裝應用程式。
D.en: Force frequent application reinstallations by users.

E.zh: 減少使用者重新安裝應用程式的需要。
E.en: Reduce the need for users to reinstall applications.

A.zh: 正確。最大限度地利用EC2執行個體可以減少閒置資源的浪費，從而降低能耗，提高資源效率。這是 AWS 永續設計的核心原則之一。
A.en: Correct. Maximizing the utilization of EC2 instances can reduce the waste of idle resources, thereby reducing energy consumption and improving resource efficiency. This is one of the core principles of sustainable design at AWS.

B.zh: 錯誤。盡量減少EC2執行個體的使用可能會導致資源閒置和能源浪費，這違反了永續發展的原則。
B.en: Incorrect. Minimizing the utilization of EC2 instances may lead to idle resources and waste of energy, which is contrary to the principle of sustainability.

C.zh: 錯誤。託管服務通常經過最佳化，可以更有效地利用資源並減少對環境的影響。減少託管服務的使用會增加資源浪費。
C.en: Incorrect. Hosting services are often optimized to use resources more efficiently and reduce environmental impact. Reducing the use of hosting services increases resource waste.

D.zh: 錯誤。頻繁地重新安裝應用程式會增加使用者的計算資源使用和能源消耗，這與永續發展目標不符。
D.en: Incorrect. Frequent reinstallation of applications increases users' computing resource usage and energy consumption, which is inconsistent with sustainability goals.

E.zh: 正確。減少使用者重新安裝應用程式的需求可以減少運算資源的使用，從而降低能耗，符合永續設計原則。
E.en: Correct. Reducing the need for users to reinstall applications can reduce the use of computing resources and thus reduce energy consumption, consistent with sustainable design principles.

answer_text.zh: A. 最大限度地利用 Amazon EC2 執行個體。；E. 減少使用者重新安裝應用程式的需要。
answer_text.en: A. Maximize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.; E. Reduce the need for users to reinstall applications.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：最大限度地利用EC2執行個體可以減少閒置資源的浪費，從而降低能耗，提高資源效率。這是 AWS 永續設計的核心原則之一。；減少使用者重新安裝應用程式的需求可以減少運算資源的使用，從而降低能耗，符合永續設計原則。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Maximizing the utilization of EC2 instances can reduce the waste of idle resources, thereby reducing energy consumption and improving resource efficiency. This is one of the core principles of sustainable design at AWS.; Reducing the need for users to reinstall applications can reduce the use of computing resources and thus reduce energy consumption, consistent with sustainable design principles.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS 雲端在哪些方面提供比本地資料中心更低的運算資源總擁有成本 (TCO)？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: In which ways does the AWS Cloud offer lower total cost of ownership (TCO) of computing resources than on-premises data centers? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS 以即用即付成本取代了前期資本支出。
A.en: AWS replaces upfront capital expenditures with pay-as-you-go costs.

B.zh: AWS 專為高可用性而設計，可消除使用者停機時間。
B.en: AWS is designed for high availability, which eliminates user downtime.

C.zh: AWS 消除了對本地 IT 人員的需求。
C.en: AWS eliminates the need for on-premises IT staff.

D.zh: AWS 利用規模經濟不斷降低價格。
D.en: AWS uses economies of scale to continually reduce prices.

E.zh: AWS 為 Amazon EC2 執行個體提供單一定價模型。
E.en: AWS offers a single pricing model for Amazon EC2 instances.

A.zh: 正確。此選項不符合問題所需的 AWS 功能或責任範圍。
A.en: Correct. This option does not meet the AWS capabilities or scope of responsibility required by the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然AWS確實是為了高可用性而設計的，但高可用性與降低TCO並沒有直接關係。高可用性更多的是關於服務可靠性而不是成本優化。
B.en: Incorrect. Although AWS is indeed designed for high availability, high availability is not directly related to reducing TCO. High availability is more about service reliability than cost optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然使用 AWS 可以減少對本地 IT 人員的需求，但仍需要雲端架構師、開發人員和其他人員來管理和最佳化雲端資產。這並不是直接降低TCO的主要因素。
C.en: Incorrect. Although using AWS can reduce the need for local IT staff, cloud architects, developers, and others are still needed to manage and optimize cloud assets. This is not the main factor directly reducing TCO.

D.zh: 正確。AWS 透過規模經濟降低營運成本，並將這些節省的成本惠及客戶。這是AWS降低TCO的核心優勢之一。
D.en: Correct. AWS reduces operating costs through economies of scale and passes these savings on to customers. This is one of the core advantages of AWS to reduce TCO.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS 為 Amazon EC2 執行個體提供多種定價模型（例如隨選執行個體、預留執行個體、Spot 執行個體等），而非單一定價模型。這種一致性是AWS的優勢，但它與降低TCO沒有直接關係。
E.en: Incorrect. AWS provides multiple pricing models (such as on-demand, reserved instances, Spot instances, etc.) for Amazon EC2 instances instead of a single pricing model. This consistency is an advantage of AWS, but it is not directly related to reducing TCO.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 以即用即付成本取代了前期資本支出。；D. AWS 利用規模經濟不斷降低價格。
answer_text.en: A. AWS replaces upfront capital expenditures with pay-as-you-go costs.; D. AWS uses economies of scale to continually reduce prices.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項不符合問題所需的 AWS 功能或責任範圍。；AWS 透過規模經濟降低營運成本，並將這些節省的成本惠及客戶。這是AWS降低TCO的核心優勢之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option does not meet the AWS capabilities or scope of responsibility required by the question.; AWS reduces operating costs through economies of scale and passes these savings on to customers. This is one of the core advantages of AWS to reduce TCO.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望將部分資源部署在 AWS 雲端。為了滿足監管要求，資料必須保留在本地。 AWS 和公司資源之間必須具有低延遲。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可用於滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy some of its resources in the AWS Cloud. To meet regulatory requirements, the data must remain local and on premises. There must be low latency between AWS and the company resources. Which AWS service or feature can be used to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Local Zones
A.en: AWS Local Zones

B.zh: 可用區
B.en: Availability Zones

C.zh: AWS Outposts
C.en: AWS Outposts

D.zh: AWS Wavelength Zones
D.en: AWS Wavelength Zones

A.zh: 錯誤。該服務是 AWS 提供的一項服務，允許使用者在特定地理位置執行低延遲應用程式。雖然它可以提供低延遲，但它不能滿足資料必須保留在本地和本地設施上的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is a service provided by AWS that allows users to run low-latency applications in specific geographical locations. While it can provide low latency, it does not meet the requirement that data must remain local and on local facilities.

B.zh: 錯誤。這些選擇是 AWS 區域中的多個資料中心，用於實現高可用性和冗餘。它們是 AWS 雲端的一部分，資料不會保存在本地設施上。
B.en: Incorrect. These choices are multiple data centers in AWS Regions used for high availability and redundancy. They are part of the AWS cloud and the data is not kept on local facilities.

C.zh: 正確。本服務是一種完全託管的解決方案，可讓使用者在本機設施中執行 AWS 服務，同時保持與 AWS 雲端的一致性。它滿足資料必須保留在本地和本地設施上的要求，並提供低延遲。
C.en: Correct. This service is a fully managed solution that allows users to run AWS services in on-premises facilities while maintaining consistency with the AWS cloud. It meets the requirement that data must remain local and on local facilities and provides low latency.

D.zh: 錯誤。該服務是針對5G網路最佳化的服務，旨在提供超低延遲，但它不符合「資料必須保留在本地且位於本地設施上」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is a service optimized for 5G networks and is designed to provide ultra-low latency, but it does not meet the requirement that "data must remain local and on local facilities".

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：本服務是一種完全託管的解決方案，可讓使用者在本機設施中執行 AWS 服務，同時保持與 AWS 雲端的一致性。它滿足資料必須保留在本地和本地設施上的要求，並提供低延遲。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed solution that allows users to run AWS services in on-premises facilities while maintaining consistency with the AWS cloud. It meets the requirement that data must remain local and on local facilities and provides low latency.
